title: csp: Crystal structure prediction for layered herringbone polyacene packings
description: Reproduction of the crystal structure prediction pipeline from Ono et al., "Stepwise Quantum-Chemical Optimization Reveals the Origin of Layered Herringbone Packing and Polymorphism in Polyacenes" (Commun. Chem., submitted). Includes both the csp Python/Streamlit package and Ono's original DFT-D optimization scripts (legacy/ono_scripts/).
